name: Lomi Lomi Salmon Spread Dxdg05a
recipeIngredient: 3 oz package of smoked salmon, cut into small pieces
1 tbsp green onion top thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese with the smoked salmon.
2. Add the lemon juice and chopped onion to the mixture.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
4. Sprinkle the green onion tops on top of the spread.
